title: Jos, Plateau — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jos, Plateau: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jos is a city in Plateau with a population of 1,020,000. A city on the Jos Plateau known for its cool climate, tin mining history, and as a tourist destination in central Nigeria.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
